metadata.name: File an Appeal on an Audit Decision

description: A client disagrees with the final decision of an IRS audit and wants to appeal.

nodes.task_description: Review the final audit report (Revenue Agent Report) and the client's objections.

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands the points of disagreement.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a formal protest letter outlining the client's position and the laws that support it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts a detailed legal and factual argument.

nodes.task_description: File the protest letter with the IRS Appeals Office within the specified time limit.
